cards.afterText: Draw 1 card. If you won the combat, draw 2 cards instead.
cards.title: I’m Thinking I’m Back.

cards.immediateText: Cancel all effects on your opponent's card.
cards.title: feint

cards.afterText: Move John Wick up to 2 spaces.
cards.title: man of focus, commitment, sheer wilL...

cards.afterText: If you won the combat, choose one of the fighters in the combat and move them up to 3 spaces.
cards.title: They call him baba yaga

cards.basicText: Move John Wick up to 5 spaces. You may move through spaces containing opposing fighters. Gain 1 action.
cards.title: riding the mustang mach 1

cards.basicText: Deal 1 damage to all opposing fighters in John Wick's zone. Recover 2 health.
cards.title: I ONCE SAW HIM KILL THREE MEN IN A BAR WITH A PENCIL...

cards.basicText: Reveal the top card of your deck. Deal damage equal to its BOOST value to one fighter in John Wick's zone. Put the card in your hand.
cards.title: desserts

cards.afterText: If you won the combat, gain 1 action.
cards.duringText: You may discard any WEAPON cards. Add 2 to this card's value for each WEAPON card discarded.
cards.title: weapon - Kel-Tec KSG

cards.duringText: If John Wick started this turn in a different space, this card's value is 5 instead.
cards.title: weapon - TTI TR-1 Ultralight

cards.duringText: Your opponent discards 1 random card. Add its BOOST value to this card's attack value.
cards.title: weapon -   SIG SG 552

cards.duringText: You may discard any number of cards from your hand. This card's value is +1 for each card you discard.
cards.title: weapon -  M4A1

cards.afterText: If John Wick has 5 or less health but is not defeated, you may place him in any space and set his health to 8.
cards.title: by the elder intervention

cards.afterText: Choose a WEAPON card in your discard pile and add it to your hand.
cards.title: guns...lots of guns

cards.afterText: If you won the combat, draw 1 card. If you lost the combat recover 2 health.
cards.title: "SI VIS PACEM, PARA BELLUM"

cards.afterText: If you played this card to attack, gain 1 action.
cards.duringText: If you play this card to defend, this card's value is 5 instead.
cards.title: YOU WANTED ME BACK. I'M BACK.

cards.basicText: Choose an opponent. They discard the top card of their deck. Draw cards equal to the BOOST value of the discarded card.
cards.title: "fortis fortuna adiuvat"

hero.name: john wick
hero.specialAbility: After you attack on your turn, if you lose the combat you may deal 1 damage to an adjacent opposing fighter.

sidekick.name: Sidekick
sidekick.quote: “Well, John wasn’t exactly ‘The Boogeyman.’ He was the One you sent To kill the FUCKING Boogeyman.”

name: John Wick
note:
John Wick a retired Assassin, is a weapons expert and deadly in close combat. This character uses a mechanic based on weapons cards, and after you made your attack you may deal 1 damage to an opponent, trying to make a frenetic timing like the movies. Use your knife to gain and advantage over your opponent. Don't get to happy trigger, because You may run out of cards to quickly.

Updated 2.0 (26.09.2020)
Modified some cards and change other effects, for more balance, less OP.

Update 3.0 (30.10.2024) Better Images, upscaled for more detail.

Updated 2.5 (20.06.2022)
Just quick wording on Fortis Fortuna, to make it neutral to play. Really appreciate all your comments.

Updated 3.0 (18.06.2021)
Modified some images on cards and corrected some typos.

Updated 4.0 (21.06.2021)
Better images, rework on the card back, and modified some card (A pistol Shot). - 1 Combat Manuvering

Update 5.0 (16.07.2021)
Awesome News a friend named Trungid, make a fix and change of cards names, that suit well with the original idea, also the art work pretty well, with the changes. Not only esthetic changes, but changes on effect cards. Thanks for your comments and suggestions Trungid.

Final Update (21.09.2021), With the final colors used (red and black), a card back that i like, and fixed the balance with the help of other members. Nothing more to change.

Art Update (14.08.2022) Some changes on art. Update with JW4 teaser poster.
